rows.label: xs07060100_MSG0001
rows.name: Gwin-san.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs07060100_MSG0002
rows.name:
Lin-chan, you're already here? Even
after fighting such a huge horde?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs07060100_MSG0003
rows.name: Don't underestimate Tatsu's team, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs07060100_MSG0004
rows.name: Guys like that are easy work, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs07060100_MSG0005
rows.name: I'll make breakfast out of you[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs07060100_MSG0006
rows.name: Colonel Elma, thank you for the backup.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs07060100_MSG0007
rows.name:
Likewise. More importantly,
where are Iriina and Marcus?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs07060100_MSG0008
rows.name: They're near the Life over there, but[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs07060100_MSG0009
rows.name: Are you the only ones here?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs07060100_MSG0010
rows.name: Yes, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs07060100_MSG0011
rows.name:
Strange. I thought the main
force was somewhere else.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs07060100_MSG0012
rows.name: Could it be[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs07060100_MSG0013
rows.name: Iriina! Marcus! Run!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs07060100_MSG0014
rows.name: Huh!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs07060100_MSG0015
rows.name: Marcus![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs07060100_MSG0016
rows.name: Right![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs07060100_MSG0041
rows.name:
Aww, too bad. I wonder if primitive
species have sharp intuition?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs07060100_MSG0042
rows.name:
That voice... The woman
from Nightglow Forest![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs07060100_MSG0043
rows.name:
The main force was somewhere
else... just as I suspected.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs07060100_MSG0044
rows.name: I see... Oh well.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs07060100_MSG0045
rows.name:
I just need to crush you
bastards with this unit.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs07060100_MSG0046
rows.name: You used the Life to lure us into a trap...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs07060100_MSG0047
rows.name: It's a little different from a trap.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs07060100_MSG0048
rows.name: My goal is... those faces right there.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs07060100_MSG0049
rows.name:
I want to see Earthlings' faces
twisted in despair like that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs07060100_MSG0050
rows.name: Earthlings are an eyesore, you see.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs07060100_MSG0051
rows.name:
Though what's truly an eyesore are
the flesh-and-blood Earthlings.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs07060100_MSG0053
rows.name:
Well, even destroying manufactured puppets
like you is fun, so I'll do it anyway.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs07060100_MSG0054
rows.name: That's all![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs07060100_MSG0055
rows.name: You know about B.B.s and the Life[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs07060100_MSG0056
rows.name:
I know. Because I've got someone
quite well-informed working with me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs07060100_MSG0057
rows.name:
That's why I also understand
why Earthlings are panicking.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs07060100_MSG0058
rows.name:
There's a limit to the
operational time, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs07060100_MSG0059
rows.name: The operational limit of this so-called Life.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs07060100_MSG0060
rows.name:
If I wait for that, you bastards
will all be unable to move.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs07060100_MSG0061
rows.name:
Truthfully, I could just
wait for that, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs07060100_MSG0062
rows.name:
smashing that thing right in front of
you Earthlings would also be fu[ST:wide ]―![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs07060100_MSG0063
rows.name: Be silent, barbarian of Samaar![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs07060100_MSG0064
rows.name:
Your arrogance has caused many
tragedies throughout the universe.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs07060100_MSG0065
rows.name: I won't let that tragedy repeat itself.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs07060100_MSG0066
rows.name:
You're just an Earthling. What
could you possibly know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs07060100_MSG0067
rows.name: Take her down.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs07060100_MSG0068
rows.name: Iriina's team, handle the surrounding Dolls![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs07060100_MSG0069
rows.name: Right![ST:wait ]
